script_model_response:
I found a great selection of coffee shops near Times Square! Here's a comprehensive list with all the available details:

## ☕ Coffee Shops Near Times Square, NYC

### ⭐ Top Rated (4.7 - 4.9 stars)

| 4 | **MOKAFÉ** | 687 8th Ave, New York, NY 10036 | ⭐ 4.7 | Cafe |
| 5 | **Frisson Espresso** | 326 W 47th St, New York, NY 10036 | ⭐ 4.7 | Bakery & Cafe |
| 6 | **GRIND NYC Coffee Shop & Bagel House** | 602 9th Ave, New York, NY 10036 | ⭐ 4.7 | Bakery & Cafe |

### ⭐ Highly Rated (4.5 - 4.6 stars)

| # | Name | Address | Rating | Type |
|---|------|---------|--------|------|
| 7 | **Bird & Branch Coffee Roasters** | 359 W 45th St, New York, NY 10036 | ⭐ 4.6 | Cafe |
| 8 | **St Kilda Coffee** | 328 W 44th St, New York, NY 10036 | ⭐ 4.6 | Cafe |
| 9 | **NY Bakery and Desserts Times Square** | 1580 Broadway, New York, NY 10036 | ⭐ 4.6 | Bakery & Cafe |
| 10 | **Pavé** | 20 W 46th St, New York, NY 10036 | ⭐ 4.6 | Bakery & Cafe |
| 11 | **Gumption Coffee** | 106 W 45th St, New York, NY 10036 | ⭐ 4.5 | Cafe |
| 12 | **Ground Central Coffee Company** | 888 8th Ave, New York, NY 10019 | ⭐ 4.5 | Cafe & Bookstore |
| 13 | **Masseria Caffe & Bakery** | 235 W 48th St, New York, NY 10036 | ⭐ 4.5 | Bakery & Cafe |
| 14 | **Bibble & Sip** | 253 W 51st St, New York, NY 10019 | ⭐ 4.5 | Bakery & Cafe |
| 15 | **Bunny&Bro Coffee** | 20 W 43rd St, New York, NY 10036 | ⭐ 4.5 | Cafe |

### ⭐ Good Options (4.0 - 4.2 stars)

| # | Name | Address | Rating | Type |
|---|------|---------|--------|------|
| 16 | **Ground Central Coffee Company** | 1166 6th Ave, New York, NY 10036 | ⭐ 4.2 | Cafe |

| 18 | **Bluestone Lane Times Square** | 11 Times Sq, New York, NY 10036 | ⭐ 4.1 | Cafe & Bar |
| 19 | **For Five Coffee Times Square** | 117 W 46th St, New York, NY 10036 | ⭐ 4.0 | Bakery & Cafe |
| 20 | **Central Perk Coffee Company** | 20 Times Square, New York, NY 10036 | ⭐ 4.0 | Cafe |

---

## 🏆 My Top Recommendations

1. **787 Coffee** (4.9⭐) - Highest rated, right on 46th Street - perfect for specialty coffee lovers
2. **Le Parisien Bakery** (4.8⭐) - Great for coffee + pastries combo
3. **Bibble & Sip** (4.5⭐) - Famous for their cream puffs and excellent coffee
4. **Central Perk Coffee Company** - Located *right in* Times Square at 20 Times Square (fun for Friends fans!)

---

### ⚠️ Note on Phone Numbers & Hours
Unfortunately, the search results didn't include phone numbers or opening hours. I recommend:
- **Google Maps** - Search each shop name to get current hours and contact info
- **Yelp** - Often has the most up-to-date business hours
- Most Times Square area coffee shops open early (around 7 AM) and close late (8-10 PM) to serve tourists and theatergoers

Would you like me to search for more specific information about any of these coffee shops, or help you find other types of places for your weekend trip?
